go_nogo_notes: STRONG candidate. High buyer diversity (HHI 838). 20.8% margin viable. China sourcing 69%. Key risk: BIS QCO compliance (₹2L + 12 weeks), high competition (18K sellers). FTA opportunity: ASEAN route saves 10% BCD. Recommend: Start with battery chargers/inverters (highest demand), source via Thailand for FTA benefit.
